ddls:
CREATE TABLE "racing_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing event (e.g., British Grand Prix) */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track where the event is held */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event is held */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the event belongs to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Grand Prix, practice session, qualifying session) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "track_temperature" TEXT /* Track temperature during the event */,
  "air_temperature" TEXT /* Air temperature during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track (e.g., Silverstone) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the track (e.g., Northamptonshire, UK) */,
  "length_km" REAL /* Length of the track in kilometers */,
  "track_surface" TEXT /* Surface of the track (e.g., asphalt, concrete) */,
  "number_of_turns" INTEGER /* Number of turns in the track */,
  "pit_lane_length" REAL /* Length of the pit lane */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2022 Formula One World Championship) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "championship_name" TEXT /* Name of the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "driver_number" INTEGER /* Driver number */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constructors" (
  "constructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constructor */,
  "constructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the constructor (e.g., Williams) */,
  "base_country" TEXT /* Base country of the constructor (e.g., UK) */,
  "chassis" TEXT /* Chassis type used by the constructor */,
  "engine_supplier" TEXT /* Engine supplier for the constructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "constructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the constructor of the car */,
  "car_number" INTEGER /* Number of the car */,
  "engine" TEXT /* Engine used in the car (e.g., Renault) */,
  "gearbox" TEXT /* Gearbox type used in the car */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the car */,
  "tyre_supplier" TEXT /* Tyre supplier for the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racing_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racing event */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the driver in the race */,
  "laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps completed by the driver */,
  "time_retired" TEXT /* Time retired or reason for retirement */,
  "reason_retired" TEXT /* Reason for retirement */,
  "fastest_lap_time" TEXT /* Fastest lap time achieved by the driver */,
  "fastest_lap_number" INTEGER /* Number of the fastest lap */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_results_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_results_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qualifying_results" (
  "qualifying_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each qualifying result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racing event */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car */,
  "grid_position" INTEGER /* Grid position of the driver */,
  "lap_time" TEXT /* Lap time of the driver */,
  "qualifying_round" TEXT /* Qualifying round (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualifying_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifying_results_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifying_results_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifying_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pit_stops" (
  "pit_stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pit stop */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racing event */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car */,
  "lap" INTEGER /* Lap number of the pit stop */,
  "stop_time" TEXT /* Time taken for the pit stop */,
  "tyre_compound_used" TEXT /* Tyre compound used during the pit stop */,
  "pit_crew_performance" TEXT /* Performance of the pit crew */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pit_stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pit_stops_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pit_stops_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pit_stops_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_standings" (
  "driver_standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver standing */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racing event */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_standings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_standings_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constructor_standings" (
  "constructor_standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constructor standing */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racing event */,
  "constructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the constructor */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the constructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constructor_standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constructor_standings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constructor_standings_constructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("constructor_id") REFERENCES constructors ("constructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, viewer) */,
  "team_affiliation" TEXT /* Team affiliation of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., engineering, strategy, marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racing event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Specific data viewed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telemetry_data" (
  "telemetry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telemetry data point */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racing event */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car */,
  "lap_number" INTEGER /* Lap number for which the telemetry data was collected */,
  "speed" TEXT /* Speed of the car */,
  "acceleration" TEXT /* Acceleration of the car */,
  "braking_distance" TEXT /* Braking distance of the car */,
  "cornering_speed" TEXT /* Cornering speed of the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("telemetry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_data_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_data_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_data_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racing event */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature during the event */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Humidity during the event */,
  "wind_speed" TEXT /* Wind speed during the event */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Precipitation during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id")
)
